class Solution:
    def semiOrderedPermutation(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        pos_1 = nums.index(1)
        pos_n = nums.index(n)
        
        swaps = 0
        
        # Move 1 to the first position
        swaps += pos_1
        
        # Move n to the last position
        swaps += (n - 1 - pos_n)
        
        # If 1 and n have crossed during the moves, subtract 1
        if pos_1 > pos_n:
            swaps -= 1
        
        return swaps
